exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 52.5kg × 9 — conservative start week 1; build tempo control (3-1-2)

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 100kg × 8 — stay controlled, emphasise mind-muscle connection quads/glutes

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 52.5kg × 9 — neutral grip, hinge pattern for hamstrings/glutes/lower back

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 50kg × 14 — isolate hamstrings, antagonist to quad-dominant patterns above

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 55kg × 8 — direct glute stimulus, hold top position 1s for mind-muscle

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 28 reps — strict abs work, controlled descent (3-1-2 tempo); lower reps/set this week for MEV

notes: Leg day week 1 MEV: quads 3+3=6 sets, hamstrings 3+2=5 sets, glutes 2+2=4 sets (✓ optimal), lower_back 3 sets, abs 3 sets. All at RPE 7, stop 3–4 reps from failure. Emphasise 3-1-2 tempo throughout; mind-muscle connection on every rep. 2800 kcal, 155g protein. Neutral grip RDL for shoulder safety.
